Hello my friend [大佬個名]. Did you see how our water car just outside the temple and..err....put..shooting some colour water to the....some routers outside the temple? 英文翻譯：
Hello friend. As you may know, our water cannon truck has "mis"fired, causing the mosque to be dyed blue. Would you be so kind to send our regrets to Chief Imam and explain that it was due to rioters standing outside the mosque.
